languages.text: "Отправляясь в последний поход, я оставил Янус процветающим миром, где хозяйствование велось достойно, а власть протектората была неоспорима. Теперь же он ввергнут вами в упадок и анархию! Мне глубоко отвратителен сей факт, и я намерен исправить это".

"When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."
languages.original_text: "Отправляясь в последний поход, я оставил Янус процветающим миром, где хозяйствование велось достойно, а власть протектората была неоспорима. Теперь же он ввергнут вами в упадок и анархию! Мне глубоко отвратителен сей факт, и я намерен исправить это".

traits.locale_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus as a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

"When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

"When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

"When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

languages.text: «Cuando partí en mi última expedición, Janus era un mundo próspero que se gobernaba de manera honorable, y la autoridad del protectorado estaba más allá de toda duda. Y ahora usted lo ha sumido en la decadencia y la anarquía. Encuentro esta situación absolutamente deleznable, y pretendo rectificarla».
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando partí en mi última expedición, Janus era un mundo próspero que se gobernaba de manera honorable, y la autoridad del protectorado estaba más allá de toda duda. Y ahora usted lo ha sumido en la decadencia y la anarquía. Encuentro esta situación absolutamente deleznable, y pretendo rectificarla».

languages.text: “当我踏上最后一次远征时，加努斯还是一个繁荣的世界。治理井然有序，属地的权威无可置疑。如今，你却让它陷入了衰败与混乱。我对此深恶痛绝，必定要亲自纠正这一切。”
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: “当我踏上最后一次远征时，加努斯还是一个繁荣的世界。治理井然有序，属地的权威无可置疑。如今，你却让它陷入了衰败与混乱。我对此深恶痛绝，必定要亲自纠正这一切。”

languages.text: « Quand je suis parti pour ma dernière expédition, j'ai laissé sur Janus une société prospère, dont la gouvernance était assurée avec honneur et où l'autorité du protectorat était indiscutable. Par votre faute, ces terres ont sombré dans le déclin et l'anarchie. Ce seul constat me révolte, et j'entends rectifier le tir. »
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus as a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: « Quand je suis parti pour ma dernière expédition, j'ai laissé sur Janus une société prospère, dont la gouvernance était assurée avec honneur et où l'autorité du protectorat était indiscutable. Par votre faute, ces terres ont sombré dans le déclin et l'anarchie. Ce seul constat me révolte, et j'entends rectifier le tir. »

languages.text: "Son seferime çıktığımda Janus'u, yönetimin onurlu bir şekilde yürütüldüğü ve protektora otoritesinin tartışılmaz olduğu müreffeh bir dünya olarak bırakmıştım. Şimdi onu gerileme ve anarşiye sürükledin. Bu gerçeği son derece iğrenç buluyorum ve bunu düzeltmeye niyetliyim."
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: "Son seferime çıktığımda Janus'u, yönetimin onurlu bir şekilde yürütüldüğü ve protektora otoritesinin tartışılmaz olduğu müreffeh bir dünya olarak bırakmıştım. Şimdi onu gerileme ve anarşiye sürükledin. Bu gerçeği son derece iğrenç buluyorum ve bunu düzeltmeye niyetliyim."

languages.text: 「最後の遠征に出る時、私はヤヌスに繁栄し、誠実な統治が行われ、保護領の権威は疑いようのない世界を遺しました。しかし、あなたはそれを衰退と混乱に陥れたのです。私はこの事実を全く嫌悪し、それを修正するつもりです。」
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now, you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: 「最後の遠征に出る時、私はヤヌスに繁栄し、誠実な統治が行われ、保護領の権威は疑いようのない世界を遺しました。しかし、あなたはそれを衰退と混乱に陥れたのです。私はこの事実を全く嫌悪し、それを修正するつもりです。」

languages.text: "Als ich zu meiner letzten Expedition aufbrach, verließ ich eine blühende Welt, die ehrenhaft regiert und auf der die Autorität des Protektorats nicht infrage gestellt wurde. Mittlerweile habt Ihr Janus in die Anarchie gestürzt." Ich empfinde diesen Umstand als erschreckend und werde ihn korrigieren."
languages.original_text: "When I departed on my final expedition, I left Janus as a prosperous world, where governance was conducted honourably and the authority of the protectorate was beyond question. Now you have plunged it into decline and anarchy. I find the fact utterly abhorrent, and I intend to rectify it."

traits.locale_text: "Als ich zu meiner letzten Expedition aufbrach, verließ ich eine blühende Welt, die ehrenhaft regiert und auf der die Autorität des Protektorats nicht infrage gestellt wurde. Mittlerweile habt Ihr Janus in die Anarchie gestürzt." Ich empfinde diesen Umstand als erschreckend und werde ihn korrigieren."
